suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a workflow convention to explicitly declare least-privilege `permissions:` blocks on every GitHub Actions job, including deploy jobs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In .github/workflows/cd.yml, build-and-push declares permissions but deploy omits them; reviewer flagged this as a non-blocking convention inconsistency.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker documented Docker Swarm deploy gotchas in .factory/library/environment.md.
